boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the security operator execute the incident-response action now? Focus: public breach notification draft.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact execution boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing approval and scope match block execution now.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record says the required legal/security approval and final scope match are still missing, and the boundary text confirms execution cannot proceed from urgency or severity alone. Policy requires exact boundary closure before action. Escalate until the dependency is resolved.
open_blockers: current legal/security approval and final scope match
